non_claims: The hash binds a canonical span-free projection of pinned rustdoc JSON for the complete compiler-visible package API, including hidden documented items; it is not a protocol hash or authority capability.
Removing span objects prevents checkout and Cargo-home paths from changing the digest; every other rustdoc field remains bound.
RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP enables pinned rustdoc JSON generation only and grants no production or release authority.
Updating either digest is a Class E review action and requires inspecting the semantic API delta.
